title: The Grove
description: The official modpack for The Grove
body:
🎮 The Grove | Minecraft Fabric Cobblemon Server 🎮

Welcome to a world filled with adventure, mystery, and hundreds of custom Pokémon models! Our server, The Grove, is all about pushing the limits and adding as many features as possible to enhance your Cobblemon experience. 🌍

What awaits you in The Grove? Let's take a look:

Visit the Archaeologist - Revive fossil Pokémon and bring them to life! Our underground mine system is filled with fossils and loot waiting to be discovered.

🔍﻿ Explore Area Zero - A custom map where paradox Pokémon roam. Can you catch them all?

🏛️﻿ Summon Legendary Pokémon - Build shrines and summon legendary Pokémon to fight by your side!

🚀﻿ Meet the Astronaut - Visit the wormholes and try to beat the race to catch an Ultra Beast.

🔮﻿ Discover Mythical Shrines in Area Zero - Summon mythical Pokémon for an epic battle!

🎨﻿ Over 160 Custom Models - We've added over 160 custom models on top of the base Cobblemon mod to give you a unique and immersive experience.

🔗﻿ Join Us Today!
Server IP: play.thegrove.gg
